jobs.description: Checks your game's daily-active-to-monthly-active user ratio (a core "stickiness" health metric) and flags when it's trending down. Use this if engagement has ever quietly eroded for weeks before it showed up as a scary number in a monthly business review.

jobs.name: Daycare Playgroup Staff-to-Dog Ratio Check
jobs.description: Compares the number of dogs checked into each daycare playgroup against the staff assigned to supervise it and flags any group over your target ratio. Use this if you've ever had a playgroup get too crowded for the handlers on the floor before anyone noticed.

jobs.name: Database Backup Restore Verification
jobs.description: Actually restores your latest database backup to a throwaway database and checks it's queryable. Use this if `backup-reminder` isn't enough — a backup file existing doesn't mean it's actually restorable.

jobs.name: DCA Contribution Reminder
jobs.description: Checks your dollar-cost-averaging log and warns if it's been longer than your planned interval since the last logged contribution. Use this if you've ever meant to invest a fixed amount on a schedule and let a month slip by without actually placing the order.

jobs.name: DEA Biennial Controlled Substance Inventory Reminder
jobs.description: Checks the date of the pharmacy's last full physical inventory of controlled substances (required at least every two years by DEA rule, or on whatever shorter interval your state requires) and warns as the deadline approaches. Use this if scheduling the full count has ever slipped your mind until it was almost overdue.

jobs.name: DeFi Liquidation Risk Watch
jobs.description: Checks a lending position's current collateral ratio and warns before it gets close to the liquidation threshold. Use this if a position has ever gotten liquidated during a price dip because nobody was watching the health factor in real time.

jobs.name: DeFi Protocol TVL Drop Alert
jobs.description: Checks a DeFi protocol's total value locked (TVL) via a public API and alerts when it drops sharply over a short window — often an early sign of a bank run, exploit, or loss of confidence. Use this if you've ever wanted a warning before a protocol you have funds in got worse, not after.

jobs.name: Third-Party Delivery Commission Reconciliation
jobs.description: Recalculates what a delivery platform (DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub) should have paid out after commission and fees, and flags orders where the actual payout came in lower than expected. Use this if you've ever suspected a delivery platform's payout report doesn't quite match its own published commission rate but never checked.

jobs.name: Supplier Delivery Receiving Discrepancy Check
jobs.description: Compares what was ordered from a supplier against what was actually received on the delivery receiving log and flags shortages or overages. Use this if a supplier has ever shorted a case of product and it only got noticed mid-service when the kitchen ran out.

jobs.name: Demand Response Event Participation Check
jobs.description: After a demand-response event has been called, compares each enrolled customer's or device's actual load reduction against their baseline and committed curtailment amount, and lists which ones didn't curtail as expected. Use this if your utility runs demand-response programs and needs a quick way to see who followed through on an event versus who needs a follow-up call, a performance-payment adjustment, or a non-compliance notice.

jobs.name: Department Budget Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares each department's or program's actual spending against its budget and flags meaningful overages or underspend. Use this if a department has ever blown through its annual budget months early because nobody was checking actual-vs-budget until year-end reconciliation.

jobs.name: Dependabot Alert Digest
jobs.description: Rolls up open Dependabot security alerts across a repo into one digest. Use this if Dependabot alerts have ever piled up in a tab nobody checks instead of getting triaged as they come in.

jobs.name: Dependency Vulnerability Audit
jobs.description: Checks your project's dependencies for known security vulnerabilities and packages that are way out of date, then summarizes what to fix first. Use this if you want a heads-up before something exploitable slips into production.

jobs.name: Destination Vaccination/Health Requirement Check
jobs.description: Reminds you to verify vaccination and health-entry requirements for your destination before you travel. Use this if you've ever booked an international trip and only found out about a required vaccine or health form a week before departure.

jobs.name: Diagnostic Equipment Calibration Check
jobs.description: Tracks calibration due dates for in-house diagnostic equipment (x-ray, in-house lab analyzers, ultrasound) and warns before any lapse. Use this if a lab result has ever been called into question because equipment calibration had quietly lapsed and nobody noticed until an audit.

jobs.name: DID/Phone Number Inventory Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks your pool of unassigned DIDs (direct inward dial numbers) per rate center or area code and warns when the available count is running low. Use this if a sales order has ever stalled because there were no numbers left to assign in the customer's requested area code.

jobs.name: Discord Community Mod Queue Digest
jobs.description: Summarizes flagged messages, mod-bot actions, and open reports in your game's Discord server since the last check, so moderators start their shift with a prioritized list instead of scrolling channel history. Use this if a raid, a flame war, or a scam-link wave has ever been well underway before a moderator happened to notice.

jobs.name: Discount Approval Pending Check
jobs.description: Flags deals with a discount above your standard threshold that are still waiting on manager approval, especially ones that have been sitting for a while. Use this if a rep has ever quoted a customer a deep discount and the deal stalled for days waiting on an approval nobody knew was pending.

jobs.name: Disk Space Check
jobs.description: Checks how full a disk/volume is and warns you before it fills up. Use this if you've ever had a server or laptop grind to a halt because disk usage crept up unnoticed.

jobs.name: Dividend Payment Tracker
jobs.description: Checks that an expected dividend payment actually landed by its scheduled pay date. Use this if a dividend has ever quietly not shown up and it took weeks to notice something was wrong with a holding or broker.

jobs.name: DNS Record Drift Check
jobs.description: Checks that a DNS record still resolves to the value you expect, and flags drift. Use this if you've ever had DNS quietly change (an expired record, a misconfigured provider) and only found out when something broke.

jobs.name: Loading Dock Schedule Conflict Check
jobs.description: Checks tomorrow's dock appointments for double-bookings or gaps too tight to actually unload a truck in. Use this if two carriers have ever shown up for the same dock door at the same time because scheduling was done in a shared spreadsheet nobody cross-checked.

jobs.name: Docker Image & Container Prune
jobs.description: Cleans up stopped containers and dangling Docker images so they don't quietly eat your disk. Use this if you run Docker locally or on a server and never remember to clean up after yourself.

jobs.name: State DOI Regulatory Filing Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Warns before a state Department of Insurance filing deadline (rate filings, annual statements, market conduct reports) so nothing gets submitted late. Use this if a regulatory filing has ever gone out late because the deadline lived only in one compliance person's memory.

jobs.name: Donation Acknowledgment Lag Check
jobs.description: Flags donations that haven't been thanked yet and are approaching or past your acknowledgment window. Use this if a donor has ever given and waited weeks for a thank-you, or if a gift needing a timely tax-receipt letter almost slipped past the deadline.

jobs.name: Donor Pledge Installment Overdue Check
jobs.description: Checks a multi-year pledge schedule for installments that are past due and haven't been received. Use this if a multi-year pledge has ever fallen behind on its payment schedule without anyone noticing until the pledge period was almost over.

jobs.name: Dormant Account Reactivation Check
jobs.description: Flags accounts that have gone completely silent — no login at all for an extended stretch — regardless of payment status, so they can be routed into a reactivation effort instead of being written off silently. Use this if accounts that stopped logging in months ago only come up again when finance asks why you're still paying to host them.

jobs.name: Downloads Folder Auto-Organize
jobs.description: Sorts files sitting in your downloads folder into subfolders by type (images, documents, archives, installers), so it doesn't turn into an unsearchable pile. Use this if your downloads folder has ever hit hundreds of files with zero structure.

jobs.name: Driver Hours-of-Service Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks logged driving hours against the daily hours-of-service limit and flags any driver close to or over it. Use this if a driver has ever run over their legal on-duty hours because nobody was tallying it in real time.

jobs.name: Driver License/CDL Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks tracked drivers' license or CDL expiry dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a driver has ever kept driving a fleet vehicle on an expired license because nobody was tracking renewal dates separately from vehicle registration.

jobs.name: Driver MVR Review Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks when each driver's motor vehicle record (MVR) was last pulled and reviewed, and flags drivers overdue for their periodic re-check. Use this if a driver has ever kept racking up points or violations on their record for a year or more before anyone at the company noticed.

jobs.name: Driver Safety Score Monitor
jobs.description: Reviews telematics-derived driver safety scores (harsh braking, hard acceleration, speeding events) and flags drivers trending toward risky behavior. Use this if a driver's habits have ever gone unaddressed until an accident or a spiked insurance premium made it impossible to ignore.

jobs.name: Drought Monitor Severity Alert
jobs.description: Checks the current U.S. Drought Monitor (or equivalent regional drought index) category for your county/region and alerts you when it worsens, so long-term water and planting decisions aren't made on stale information. Use this if you've ever found out your county moved into "extreme drought" weeks after it happened.

jobs.name: Drug Recall vs. On-Hand Stock Check
jobs.description: Matches a list of recently announced drug recalls against the pharmacy's current inventory export and flags any lot number in stock. Use this if a recalled lot has ever sat on the shelf for days after the recall notice went out simply because no one cross-checked it against inventory.

jobs.name: Dryer Vent Cleaning Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to clean out your dryer vent and lint duct based on how long it's been since the last cleaning. Use this if you've ever noticed clothes taking longer than usual to dry, which is a fire-risk warning sign, not just an annoyance.

jobs.name: Duplicate Content Spot Check
jobs.description: Scans a newly submitted article against your archive of previously published pieces for suspiciously long shared word sequences, and flags matches for a human to review. Use this if a submission has ever turned out to be substantially recycled from an older piece (your own archive or someone else's) and only got caught after it published.

jobs.name: Duplicate Payment Detection
jobs.description: Scans a payments/disbursements log for the same vendor and invoice number (or same vendor/amount/date) paid more than once. Use this if a bill has ever gotten paid twice because it was submitted through two channels or reprocessed after a system hiccup.

jobs.name: Veterinarian License & DEA Registration Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each veterinarian's state license and DEA registration expiry dates and warns before either lapses. Use this if a vet has ever discovered a lapsed DEA registration only when trying to write a controlled-substance prescription — distinct from license-credential-expiry-check.yaml in healthcare, which tracks general staff credentials rather than the DVM license plus DEA dual-registration requirement specific to prescribing controlled substances for animal patients.

jobs.name: Earnings Calendar Watch
jobs.description: Checks for upcoming earnings dates on stocks you hold, so a report doesn't catch you off guard. Use this if a holding has ever moved sharply overnight and you only afterward realized earnings had been scheduled for that day.

jobs.name: Economic Nexus Threshold Check
jobs.description: Checks your year-to-date sales revenue and transaction count per state against economic nexus thresholds and flags states you're approaching or have crossed. Use this if you've ever registered for sales tax in a state only after crossing the threshold months earlier, because nobody was tracking cumulative sales by state.

jobs.name: Podcast Editing Turnaround SLA Check
jobs.description: Flags episodes sitting in the editor's queue past your usual turnaround time. Use this if an episode has ever missed its publish date because it was quietly stuck waiting on an edit and nobody followed up with the editor in time.

jobs.name: Editorial Calendar Gap Check
jobs.description: Looks at the scheduled publish dates on your editorial calendar and flags any stretch of days that's longer than expected with nothing scheduled. Use this if your publish cadence has ever quietly gone quiet because everyone assumed someone else had filled the calendar for that week.

jobs.name: EEO-1 Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Counts down to the annual EEO-1 component filing deadline so data collection and submission don't get rushed at the last minute. Use this if the EEO-1 window has ever snuck up because it only comes around once a year and nobody put it on a recurring calendar.

jobs.name: Election Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks upcoming candidate and petition filing deadlines tracked by an elections office and flags the ones coming up soon. Use this if a filing window has ever closed without your office having sent out the reminders it meant to send to prospective candidates or petitioners.

jobs.name: Email Deliverability Check
jobs.description: Checks recent bounce and spam-complaint rates for your email sends and flags a spike. Use this if a deliverability problem has ever quietly tanked open rates for a week before anyone checked the actual bounce numbers.

jobs.name: Email List Growth Rate Check
jobs.description: Compares net email list growth (new subscribers minus unsubscribes and bounces) over a recent period against a minimum growth rate, flagging a stalled or shrinking list. Use this if a list has ever been quietly shrinking for months because unsubscribes were outpacing signups and nobody was tracking the net number.

jobs.name: Embargo Date Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a press or review embargo on a title is set to lift, so announcements, ads, and retail listings can go live right on time — not early, not late. Use this if an embargo has ever been broken by accident (a listing flipped live too soon) or missed (nobody remembered to lift it) because the date only lived in an email from the publicist.

jobs.name: Emergency/After-Hours Dispatch Escalation Check
jobs.description: Checks incoming emergency or after-hours service calls (burst pipe, no heat, no power) for ones that haven't been acknowledged by on-call dispatch within your response window, and flags them for escalation. Use this if an after-hours emergency call has ever sat in a queue for an hour while the on-call tech's phone was on silent.

jobs.name: Employee Discount Abuse Check
jobs.description: Reviews employee discount usage for patterns that look like abuse — unusually high dollar volume, discounts applied to gift cards, or discounts rung up under an employee's number when they weren't scheduled to work. Use this if employee-discount abuse has ever quietly eaten margin for months because each transaction looked fine in isolation.

jobs.name: Employee Shift Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks the upcoming schedule for unfilled shifts and flags them while there's still time to find coverage. Use this if a shift has ever gone unfilled and nobody noticed until the store was short-staffed that morning.

jobs.name: Employer Match Capture Check
jobs.description: Checks that your current 401(k) contribution percentage is at least what's needed to capture your full employer match. Use this if you've ever dropped your contribution rate temporarily and forgot to bump it back up, quietly leaving free match money on the table.

jobs.name: End-of-Day Wrap Message
jobs.description: Fires around the end of your work calendar and drafts a short wrap-up: what got done today, what's carrying over to tomorrow. Use this if you close your laptop most days without a clear sense of what actually happened or what's still pending.

jobs.name: Policy Endorsement Request Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks requested policy endorsements or amendments (e.g. adding a driver, changing coverage limits) that haven't been confirmed processed within a set window and flags them for follow-up. Use this if you've ever submitted a change request to a carrier and only found out months later it was never actually applied.

jobs.name: Energy Consumption Spike Check
jobs.description: Compares today's logged energy usage against a rolling baseline and flags an unusual spike. Use this if a jump in electricity use has ever gone unnoticed until the utility bill arrived, when it could have pointed to a failing motor, a stuck compressor, or equipment left running.

jobs.name: Engagement Drop Watch
jobs.description: Compares recent post engagement to your baseline and flags a real drop. Use this if you've ever kept posting into a falling algorithm curve for weeks before noticing the numbers were down.

jobs.name: Enrollment Capacity Ratio Forecast Check
jobs.description: Looks at upcoming enrollments, planned withdrawals, and current staffing plans to flag classrooms projected to breach licensed ratio limits in the coming weeks. Use this if a classroom has ever hit its ratio limit on the first day a new child started, because nobody checked the incoming enrollment pipeline against staffing plans ahead of time — distinct from staff-child-ratio-compliance-check, which looks at today's actual headcount rather than what's coming.

jobs.name: Enrollment Waitlist Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Flags waitlisted families who haven't been contacted in a while, so a spot doesn't go unfilled because nobody worked down the list. Use this if an opening has ever sat empty for weeks while a waitlisted family who would've taken it never got a call.

jobs.name: Enrollment/Withdrawal Trend Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews new enrollments and withdrawals over time and flags a school or grade level that's losing students faster than usual. Use this if enrollment decline has ever gone unnoticed for a semester because individual withdrawals looked routine one at a time.

jobs.name: Entity Authority Document Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns before a power of attorney, corporate signing-authority certificate, or other entity-authority document reaches its expiration date. Use this if a bank, counterparty, or government office has ever rejected a signature because the power of attorney or authority certificate backing it had quietly expired.

jobs.name: Env File Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares your .env against .env.example and flags keys that are missing or extra. Use this if you've ever deployed and hit a crash because a new required env var never got set.

jobs.name: Podcast Episode Backlog Buffer Check
jobs.description: Counts how many recorded-but-unpublished episodes you have banked and warns when the buffer runs low. Use this if you've ever scrambled to record something last-minute because you didn't notice your usual cushion of ready-to-go episodes had quietly run out.

jobs.name: Podcast Episode Publish Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks that a new episode has gone out recently and flags it if your publish cadence has slipped. Use this if listeners have ever noticed a gap in your feed before you did.

jobs.name: Podcast Episode SEO Metadata Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks a newly published episode's title, description, and tags against basic discoverability requirements and flags what's missing. Use this if an episode has ever gone out with a generic title or a blank description that made it invisible in podcast app search.

jobs.name: Equipment Calibration Due Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a piece of measurement or test equipment is due for calibration. Use this if an out-of-calibration gauge has ever kept producing "passing" measurements nobody could actually trust.

jobs.name: Farm Equipment Maintenance Due Reminder
jobs.description: Tracks engine hours or mileage against manufacturer service intervals for tractors and other equipment, and warns when service is coming due. Use this if equipment has ever broken down mid-season because a service interval slipped by.

jobs.name: Equipment Rental Return Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a rented piece of equipment is due back, so it doesn't rack up late fees or an unplanned extension charge. Use this if a rental has ever run days past due because nobody was tracking the return date against the job schedule.

jobs.name: Equipment Utilization & Cost Check
jobs.description: Calculates how many billable/working days each piece of rented or owned equipment actually logged against its rental or ownership cost, and flags anything sitting idle while still costing money. Use this if a rental has ever been kept "just in case" for weeks with nothing to show for it on a timesheet.

jobs.name: Equipment Warranty Status Flagging
jobs.description: Checks installed equipment scheduled for service against its install date and warranty length, and flags whether each job should be billed to the manufacturer (still under warranty) or the customer (out of warranty). Use this if a tech has ever billed a customer for a repair that should have been a warranty job, or vice versa, because nobody checked the install date before the invoice went out.

jobs.name: Error Rate Spike Watch
jobs.description: Checks your error tracker's recent error count against a threshold and flags a spike. Use this if a bad deploy has ever quietly spiked errors for hours before anyone noticed.

jobs.name: Escalation Queue Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks how many tickets are sitting in your escalation/Tier 2 queue past a time threshold. Use this if an escalated ticket has ever waited longer for a second look than it did in the general queue, because escalation felt like the end of the process instead of the start of a new SLA clock.

jobs.name: eSIM/Data Plan Activation Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to buy and activate an eSIM or international data plan before you land, with enough lead time to install it while you still have reliable wifi. Use this if you've ever landed abroad with no way to get online until you found airport wifi.

jobs.name: ESPP Purchase Window Reminder
jobs.description: Warns before your Employee Stock Purchase Plan's enrollment change deadline or purchase date so you don't miss the window. Use this if you've ever missed an ESPP enrollment change deadline and been stuck at the same contribution rate for another entire offering period.

jobs.name: Repair Estimate Approval Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Flags repair estimates sent to a customer that haven't been approved yet, so the car doesn't sit untouched while a text goes unanswered. Use this if a vehicle has ever taken up a bay for days because nobody followed up on an estimate the customer never actually saw or responded to.

jobs.name: Estimated Read Rate Check
jobs.description: Checks what percentage of a billing cycle's meter reads were estimated rather than actually taken, and flags when that estimate rate climbs above a set threshold. Use this if you're a utility and want an early warning before a spike in estimated bills turns into a wave of billing complaints and rework.

jobs.name: ETF Premium/Discount to NAV Check
jobs.description: Checks whether an ETF's market price has drifted too far from its net asset value and flags it if the premium or discount exceeds your threshold. Use this if you hold a thinly-traded or international ETF where price/NAV divergence has ever cost more than expected on entry or exit.

jobs.name: EV Battery Health & Charging Check
jobs.description: Checks electric fleet vehicles' battery state-of-health and charging session logs, flagging vehicles with degrading batteries or charging problems. Use this if an EV has ever shown up for a route with far less range than expected because nobody was watching battery degradation between scheduled services.

jobs.name: Event Budget Overrun Check
jobs.description: Compares committed spend so far against the event budget and flags overrun risk. Use this if an event has ever come in over budget because nobody totaled up the vendor contracts until after the fact.

jobs.name: Event Insurance Certificate Deadline Check
jobs.description: Warns you before the deadline to submit a certificate of insurance (COI) to a venue, city, or permit office passes. Use this if an event has ever nearly been cancelled or fined because the venue never got the insurance paperwork it required.

jobs.name: Event Permit Application Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks the application deadlines for permits an event needs (street closure, alcohol service, amplified sound, tent/structure, food vendor) and flags any that are coming up unfiled. Use this if an event has ever nearly gotten shut down because a permit application deadline passed weeks before anyone remembered to file it.

jobs.name: Fundraising Event RSVP Shortfall Check
jobs.description: Checks confirmed RSVPs for an upcoming fundraising event against your goal and flags it if you're falling short as the date approaches. Use this if an event has ever snuck up with half-empty RSVPs and no time left to push more invitations.

jobs.name: Event Staffing Shortfall Check
jobs.description: Compares confirmed staff/volunteer signups against how many the event actually needs, and flags a shortfall while there's still time to recruit. Use this if you've ever realized you were short-staffed the day before an event instead of weeks before.

jobs.name: Eviction / Notice-to-Quit Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks active notice-to-quit and eviction filings against their next legal deadline (cure period expiry, court date, response window) and flags anything coming up. Use this if a case has ever stalled or been dismissed on a technicality because a filing or hearing deadline was missed.

jobs.name: Exchange Proof-of-Reserves Check
jobs.description: Checks whether a centralized exchange's published proof-of-reserves attestation is current and whether its reported reserve ratio still covers customer liabilities. Use this if you keep meaningful funds on an exchange and want an early nudge if its published backing looks stale or thin, rather than finding out during a run.

jobs.name: Exchange Withdrawal Confirmation Check
jobs.description: Checks whether a withdrawal sent from an exchange to a destination address has actually confirmed on-chain, so a stuck or delayed withdrawal doesn't go unnoticed. Use this if you've ever sent a withdrawal, closed the tab, and only found out days later it never arrived.

jobs.name: Exit Interview Completion Check
jobs.description: Flags departing employees whose exit interview hasn't happened yet as their last day approaches. Use this if someone has ever left without an exit interview simply because scheduling it got lost in the handoff paperwork.

jobs.name: Expansion Revenue Opportunity Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews usage-based consumption (API calls, storage, records processed, etc.) against each account's plan allowance and flags accounts regularly running over, before it becomes a support complaint about being throttled. Use this if the first sign of an account outgrowing its plan is a "why did my job fail" ticket instead of a proactive expansion conversation.

jobs.name: Fund Expense Ratio Audit
jobs.description: Looks up the current expense ratio for a list of funds you hold and flags any above a threshold you set. Use this if you've ever accumulated old funds from a former 401(k) or advisor and never audited what they actually cost you every year.

jobs.name: Expense Report Compliance Check
jobs.description: Scans submitted expense report line items for missing receipts or amounts over your policy limit for that category. Use this if reimbursements have ever gone out the door with a missing receipt or a suspiciously large "meals" line nobody double-checked.

jobs.name: Expense Report Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before the monthly expense report submission deadline passes. Use this if you've ever missed reimbursement because the expense window closed before you got around to submitting receipts.

jobs.name: Expired Medication Disposal Tracker
jobs.description: Scans the pharmacy's inventory log for items already past expiry that haven't been marked as pulled/returned/disposed yet. Use this if expired stock has ever lingered on the shelf past its pull date simply because no one circled back to finish the disposal step.

jobs.name: Expiring API Key Rotation Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a third-party API key or token you're tracking expires. Use this if an integration has ever gone down in production because a key expired and nobody rotated it in time.

jobs.name: Expiring Perishable Stock Check
jobs.description: Flags perishable inventory nearing its expiry date so it can be sold, discounted, or used before it's wasted. Use this if stock has ever expired on the shelf because nobody was tracking dates until it was too late.

jobs.name: Facility Cleaning Log Check
jobs.description: Checks that scheduled cleaning tasks (equipment wipe-down, locker rooms, floors) were actually logged as done today. Use this if a cleaning checklist has ever gone unfilled for a shift because it lived on a clipboard nobody was checking.

jobs.name: Facility License Renewal Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks your center's state childcare license, food service permit, and any other facility-level licenses against their renewal deadlines and warns before one lapses. Use this if a facility license has ever come up for renewal without enough lead time to get the paperwork and inspection done before the old one expired.

jobs.name: Facility Work Order Backlog Check
jobs.description: Reviews open facility maintenance work orders and flags the ones that have been sitting too long, especially safety-related requests. Use this if a maintenance ticket has ever gone stale for weeks until it turned into a bigger, more expensive problem.

jobs.name: Failed Login Watch
jobs.description: Watches an auth log for a burst of failed login attempts and alerts if it crosses a threshold. Use this if you run a server exposed to SSH and want an early warning for brute-force attempts.

jobs.name: Failed Payment Dunning Check
jobs.description: Checks recurring/subscription orders with a failed payment and flags ones that have been retrying too long without success, so you can step in before the customer silently churns. Use this if a subscriber has ever stayed on "payment failed" for weeks with nobody following up, quietly costing you recurring revenue.

jobs.name: Fall Cleanup Contract Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Checks your client contract list for seasonal fall cleanup service (leaf removal, bed winterizing, final mow) whose renewal date is approaching and flags the ones that haven't been confirmed yet. Use this if leaf season has ever snuck up while half your fall-cleanup clients still hadn't signed off.

jobs.name: Farm Equipment DOT/Road Safety Inspection Reminder
jobs.description: Checks road-going farm equipment (grain trucks, trailers, sprayers that travel on public roads) against required safety inspection dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if you've ever had a truck pulled over during harvest with an inspection sticker that had quietly expired.

jobs.name: Farm Subsidy/Grant Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks a list of government subsidy, cost-share, or grant programs you're tracking against their application deadlines and warns before any close. Use this if you've ever missed out on a cost-share program because the sign-up window closed before you got around to the paperwork.

jobs.name: FCC/Regulatory Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks recurring regulatory filings (FCC Form 477/499, state PUC reports, CPNI certifications, etc.) for upcoming due dates and warns with enough lead time to prepare them. Use this if a regulatory filing has ever been late, or nearly late, because the due date lived only in one person's memory.

jobs.name: Feature Adoption Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks what percent of active accounts have used a specific feature at least once, and flags when adoption is stuck below target. Use this if you shipped a feature, called it done, and never actually checked whether anyone uses it.

jobs.name: Feature Flag Staleness Audit
jobs.description: Flags feature flags that have been at 100% (or 0%) rollout for a long time and never cleaned up. Use this if your flag list has become a graveyard of decisions nobody removed the scaffolding for.

jobs.name: Fertilizer Application Scheduling Window Check
jobs.description: Checks the forecast soil/air temperature against your fertilizer program's application window and flags whether this week's scheduled applications should proceed, be held, or be moved up. Use this if fertilizer has ever gone down too early or too late in the season and wasted product or burned the turf.

jobs.name: F&I Product Attachment Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews the past week's vehicle sales against how many attached an F&I product (extended warranty, gap insurance, service contract) and flags a drop against target, plus which products are underperforming. Use this if F&I income has ever slipped for weeks before anyone noticed the attach rate had quietly drifted down.

jobs.name: Field Soil Test Due Reminder
jobs.description: Checks each field's last soil test date against a retest interval and flags any field that's overdue. Use this if you've ever applied fertilizer off a soil test that was two years stale because nobody was tracking when each field was last sampled.

jobs.name: Field Technician Truck-Roll Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks open field service (truck-roll) tickets for how long they've been waiting to be dispatched and drafts a prioritized backlog summary for dispatch. Use this if installs or repair truck-rolls have ever piled up unnoticed because dispatch was juggling tickets from memory instead of a clear aging view.

jobs.name: Field Trip Permission Slip Check
jobs.description: Checks which students still haven't returned a signed permission slip as a field trip approaches. Use this if a student has ever been left behind on a school trip because their slip got lost in a backpack and nobody followed up in time.

jobs.name: Officials' Financial Disclosure Filing Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks required financial/ethics disclosure filings for elected officials and covered staff against their due date and flags anyone who hasn't filed as the deadline gets close. Use this if an official has ever missed a disclosure filing deadline and triggered a compliance issue that a reminder earlier would have avoided.

jobs.name: Fire Drill Schedule Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks your fire/emergency evacuation drill log against the required monthly cadence and flags any month with no drill on record. Use this if a month has ever slipped by without a drill because everyone assumed someone else had scheduled it.

jobs.name: Fire Extinguisher Inspection Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to check the pressure gauge and expiration/recharge date on your home fire extinguishers based on how long it's been since the last check. Use this if you've ever grabbed an extinguisher in an emergency only to find the gauge in the red.

jobs.name: Firewall Rule Diff
jobs.description: Diffs your current firewall rules against a saved baseline and flags any drift. Use this if a firewall rule has ever changed without anyone remembering who did it or why.

jobs.name: First-Pass Yield Report
jobs.description: Calculates yesterday's first-pass yield (units that passed inspection without rework) per production line and flags any line below target. Use this if rework has ever been quietly absorbed as "normal" until someone finally rolled up the numbers and saw how much it was costing.

jobs.name: First Response Time Drift Check
jobs.description: Checks your average first response time over a recent window and flags it when it's drifting slower than target. Use this if first response time has ever quietly crept up over weeks because only the SLA-breach cases got attention, not the overall trend.

jobs.name: First-Time Fix Rate Check
jobs.description: Calculates the percentage of completed jobs in the trailing window that did NOT need a follow-up callback for the same issue, and flags it when it drops below your target. Use this as an early warning that training gaps, rushed diagnostics, or parts shortages are quietly driving up repeat visits before the callback backlog itself becomes the problem.

jobs.name: Flea/Tick Treatment Verification Before Boarding Admission
jobs.description: Checks your admission records for upcoming boarding or daycare check-ins where proof of current flea/tick treatment hasn't been recorded, which most facilities require to protect other boarded animals. Use this if you've ever admitted a pet without confirming treatment status and dealt with an infestation risk across the whole kennel afterward. This checks paperwork only — it does not apply or recommend any treatment.

jobs.name: Fleet Inspection Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each fleet vehicle's state inspection or emissions sticker expiry date and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if a shop or fleet vehicle has ever gotten pulled over — or failed a customer handoff — because its inspection quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Fleet Insurance Policy Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each vehicle's insurance policy against its expiry date and flags coverage that's about to lapse. Use this if a vehicle has ever been driven on an expired policy because renewal paperwork got missed.

jobs.name: Flight Check-in Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you when online check-in opens for an upcoming flight. Use this if you've ever missed the good seats because check-in opened while you were asleep.

jobs.name: Flight Layover Buffer Check
jobs.description: Checks your upcoming itinerary for connections shorter than a safe minimum layover time. Use this if you've ever booked a multi-leg trip and only noticed a 35-minute connection the night before flying.

jobs.name: Focus Block Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges you to start a deep-work block at set times. Use this if your day fills up with reactive work and real focus time only happens by accident.

jobs.name: Public Records Request Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks open public records (FOIA/state equivalent) requests against their statutory response deadline and flags anything close to due. Use this if a records request has ever blown past its legal response window because it sat in an inbox instead of on a tracked deadline list.

jobs.name: Food Cost Percentage Watch
jobs.description: Checks food cost as a percentage of sales against your target and flags it when it runs high. Use this if food cost has ever crept up for weeks before anyone pulled the numbers and noticed margins were shrinking.

jobs.name: Food Handler Permit Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Checks staff food handler permits and manager certifications (ServSafe or your local equivalent) against their expiration dates and flags anyone expiring soon. Use this if a health inspector has ever asked for a permit that had quietly lapsed weeks earlier.

jobs.name: Food Safety Temperature Log Check
jobs.description: Checks that fridge/freezer temperature logs were actually recorded today and flags any reading outside the safe range. Use this if a temperature log has ever gone unfilled for a shift, or a unit drifted out of range without anyone noticing until the food was already at risk.

jobs.name: Forecast Submission Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares your active rep roster against submitted forecast records for the current period and flags anyone who hasn't submitted yet. Use this if sales leadership has ever walked into a forecast review meeting only to find out half the team never actually submitted numbers.

jobs.name: Forklift Daily Safety Inspection Check
jobs.description: Checks that each forklift's required daily pre-use inspection was actually logged today. Use this if a forklift has ever been operated on a shift with no inspection logged, which is exactly what an OSHA audit will ask to see records of.

jobs.name: Form 990 Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you as your organization's Form 990 (or extension) filing deadline approaches. Use this if the annual tax filing has ever crept up during year-end fundraising crunch, leaving someone scrambling to request an extension at the last minute.

jobs.name: Form Lead CRM Sync Check
jobs.description: Checks that leads submitted through your web forms actually landed in your CRM, catching a broken integration instead of a slow rep. Use this if a form-to-CRM zap/integration has ever quietly broken and leads piled up on the form provider's side while sales thought the pipeline was just empty.

jobs.name: Free/Reduced Lunch Eligibility Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks free/reduced meal eligibility records for approvals that are about to expire and flags families who need to renew. Use this if a student has ever lost meal benefits mid-year because their eligibility lapsed and nobody sent a renewal reminder in time.

jobs.name: Freelancer Contract Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a freelance writer, illustrator, or contributor's standing contract or rate agreement expires, so it can be renewed or renegotiated before they're working (or being paid) off an expired agreement. Use this if a freelancer has ever kept filing work after their contract lapsed because nobody was tracking the expiry date.

jobs.name: Freight Invoice Rate Audit
jobs.description: Compares billed freight invoice amounts against the contracted rate for each shipment and flags overcharges. Use this if a carrier has ever quietly billed above the agreed rate and it only got caught months later during an annual freight spend review.

jobs.name: Freight Rate Spike Watch
jobs.description: Checks a freight lane's current quoted rate against your baseline and flags a spike. Use this if a shipping rate has ever quietly doubled and only got noticed when the invoice came in.

jobs.name: Frequent Boarder Loyalty Milestone Check
jobs.description: Scans boarding stay history for clients who've just crossed a loyalty program milestone (a certain number of stays or nights) and lists them so you can send a reward or thank-you. Use this if loyal repeat boarding clients have ever hit a milestone without the facility ever noticing or rewarding it.

jobs.name: Frequent Flyer Miles Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before frequent flyer miles or points expire from inactivity. Use this if you've ever lost a stash of miles just because you didn't fly or transact on the account in time.

jobs.name: Fuel Card Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Flags fuel card transactions that look unusual (too large, too frequent, or outside normal hours/locations). Use this if fuel card misuse has ever gone unnoticed until the monthly statement showed up.

jobs.name: Fuel Cost Per Route Tracker
jobs.description: Totals logged fuel spend per route over the trailing window and flags any route whose cost per stop has crept above your target, a sign of an inefficient route or a fuel-card issue. Use this if fuel costs have ever quietly eaten your margin on a route without anyone noticing until the monthly statement arrived.

jobs.name: Fuel Efficiency Trend Monitor
jobs.description: Tracks each vehicle's miles-per-gallon (or equivalent) trend over time and flags vehicles losing efficiency, which often signals a mechanical problem before it shows up as a breakdown. Use this if a vehicle's fuel costs have ever crept up for months before a mechanic found the actual cause.

jobs.name: Fuel Surcharge Rate Monitor
jobs.description: Checks the current published fuel surcharge index against your baseline and flags a jump. Use this if a carrier's fuel surcharge has ever crept up for weeks before it showed up as a bigger-than-expected line item on the freight invoice.

jobs.name: Fundraising Goal Pace Check
jobs.description: Compares total raised in an active campaign against a pro-rated pace toward the goal and flags it if you're falling behind. Use this if a fundraising campaign has ever hit its deadline only to reveal it was already off pace weeks earlier, with no time left to course-correct.

jobs.name: FX Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks a currency pair's exchange rate and alerts when it crosses a threshold you set. Use this if you're timing a transfer, payment, or purchase around a favorable rate and don't want to check manually every day.

jobs.name: In-Game Economy Inflation Watch
jobs.description: Checks your game's soft-currency source-to-sink ratio and flags when players are earning far more than they're spending, a leading sign of economy inflation. Use this if your in-game currency has ever quietly become worthless because sinks stopped keeping pace with sources and nobody caught it until prices had to be re-balanced from scratch.

jobs.name: Game Patch Notes Watch
jobs.description: Checks whether any game you regularly stream or play competitively has shipped a new patch, and summarizes what changed. Use this if you've ever gone live only to discover mid-stream that a balance patch dropped and your strategies are stale.

jobs.name: Game Server Disk Space Check
jobs.description: Checks free disk space on your self-hosted game server's world/save data volume and warns before it fills up. Use this if a server has ever stopped saving the world (or crashed outright) because the disk quietly filled up overnight.

jobs.name: Self-Hosted Game Server Uptime Check
jobs.description: Checks that your self-hosted game server (Minecraft, ARK, Valheim, etc.) is actually up and accepting connections. Use this if your community server has ever gone down overnight and players just assumed you took it offline on purpose.

jobs.name: Gas Price Alert
jobs.description: Checks current network gas price and alerts when it drops below your target, so you can time a planned transaction instead of overpaying during a busy window. Use this if you've ever paid 5x normal gas because you executed at a random moment instead of waiting.

jobs.name: Creator Gear Maintenance Reminder
jobs.description: Checks your camera, mic, and lighting gear against their maintenance or calibration schedule and flags anything due. Use this if a camera sensor has ever gone un-cleaned for a year or a battery's ever died mid-shoot because nobody tracked its age.

jobs.name: Generator Maintenance Run Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to start and run your backup generator under load based on how long it's been since the last exercise run. Use this if you've ever needed a generator during an outage and discovered then that it wouldn't start.

jobs.name: Generic Substitution Savings Report
jobs.description: Reads a period's dispensing log and summarizes how much patients and payers saved (or missed saving) from generic substitution versus brand fills. Use this if you've ever wanted a plain-English monthly summary of substitution impact without building a spreadsheet from scratch each time.

jobs.name: GPS Geofence Violation Check
jobs.description: Reviews telematics geofence alerts for fleet vehicles that left authorized zones or moved outside approved hours, and flags them for follow-up. Use this if a vehicle has ever turned up far outside its assigned route or job site and nobody knew until a fuel bill or mileage report gave it away.

jobs.name: Gift Card Expiry Check
jobs.description: Scans your gift card ledger for cards approaching their expiration date with a remaining balance. Use this if a client has ever held an unused gift card that quietly expired, turning a goodwill purchase into a complaint at checkout.

jobs.name: Gift Card Liability Reconciliation
jobs.description: Reconciles total outstanding gift card balance (liability) against cards sold minus cards redeemed for the period, and flags a mismatch worth investigating. Use this if you've ever had to guess at your gift card liability for the books instead of actually reconciling it.

jobs.name: Gift Card Liability Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares your POS's outstanding gift card balance against your accounting ledger and flags a mismatch. Use this if outstanding gift card liability has ever drifted out of sync with your books for months before anyone reconciled it at year-end and found a gap.

jobs.name: GitHub Issue Triage
jobs.description: Reviews new GitHub issues opened since the last run and sorts them into urgent/normal/low-priority with a suggested label and one-line reason. Use this if issues pile up untriaged and the urgent ones get lost in the noise until someone stumbles on them days later.

jobs.name: Grain Elevator Price Comparison
jobs.description: Compares today's cash bid across a list of your local grain elevators or buyers and flags which one is paying the most. Use this if you've ever sold to the closest elevator out of habit without checking whether another buyer down the road was paying more that day.

jobs.name: Grain Storage Temperature Check
jobs.description: Checks logged grain bin temperature and moisture readings against safe storage thresholds and flags any bin trending toward spoilage. Use this if you've ever caught hot spots or mold in stored grain only after the smell gave it away.

jobs.name: Grantor-Side Compliance Report Tracker
jobs.description: For a government agency that awards grants to outside recipients (nonprofits, contractors, other agencies): checks which recipients owe a compliance or progress report and flags the ones running late. Use this if a sub-recipient has ever gone quiet on required reporting for months before anyone on your side noticed and followed up.

jobs.name: Grant Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a grant application deadline, and can help draft the application. Use this if a funding opportunity has ever been missed simply because the deadline crept up during a busy week.

jobs.name: Grant Reporting Deadline Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a post-award grant report is due, separate from the application deadline. Use this if a funder relationship has ever soured because a required progress or financial report was late, even though the grant itself was won and the work was going fine.

jobs.name: Grant Restricted Fund Spend Check
jobs.description: Compares actual spend against a grant's approved budget line items and flags a category that's over budget or lagging well behind the grant period's pace. Use this if restricted grant funds have ever been over-spent on one line item — risking disallowed costs — or left so under-spent the grant looked unused when the report came due.

jobs.name: Groomer Appointment No-Show Pattern Check
jobs.description: Calculates the weekly no-show rate for grooming appointments and flags when it crosses a threshold, plus lists which clients have no-showed more than once. Use this if empty grooming slots from no-shows have ever eaten into a groomer's paid hours without anyone tracking the pattern.

jobs.name: Groomer Schedule Underbooking Check
jobs.description: Checks each groomer's schedule for the coming days and flags anyone whose booked hours fall below your target utilization, so staff can push rebooking outreach or promotions before those slots go to waste. Use this if a groomer's calendar has ever quietly gone half-empty for a week without anyone noticing until payroll.

jobs.name: Grooming Table & Equipment Sanitation Log Check
jobs.description: Checks your daily sanitation log for grooming tables, tubs, clippers, and dryers to make sure every station was logged as cleaned each business day, and flags any missed entries. Use this if you've ever needed to prove a consistent cleaning record for an inspection or a client complaint and found gaps in the log.

jobs.name: Grooming Client Rebooking Gap Check
jobs.description: Compares each client's typical grooming interval against how long it's actually been since their last visit, and flags anyone who's overdue for a rebooking outreach. Use this if regular grooming clients have ever quietly drifted away without anyone reaching out to get them back on the calendar.

jobs.name: Grooming Supply Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Scans your grooming supply inventory (shampoo, conditioner, ear cleaner, clipper blades, etc.) and flags anything at or below its reorder threshold. Use this if a groomer has ever run out of a core product mid-shift and had to turn away or delay a booked appointment.

jobs.name: Group Booking and Event Space Utilization Check
jobs.description: Reviews upcoming event space bookings against total bookable hours for the week and flags rooms sitting mostly empty, plus any booking missing a signed contract or deposit close to the event date. Use this if event space has ever gone underbooked for weeks with nobody noticing until the sales team reviewed the quarter.

jobs.name: Guest Complaint Resolution SLA Tracker
jobs.description: Checks logged guest complaints (not maintenance requests) against your resolution SLA and flags any still open past the deadline. Use this if a service complaint has ever sat unresolved long enough that the guest checked out still angry, instead of getting a recovery gesture while they were still on property.

jobs.name: Podcast Guest Follow-up Reminder
jobs.description: Flags recorded guest episodes that haven't been published or thanked yet. Use this if a guest has ever had to awkwardly ask when their episode was coming out because nobody followed up after recording.

jobs.name: Guest Maintenance Request Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks how many guest-reported maintenance issues are still open and flags any sitting past your target resolution time. Use this if a reported issue (broken AC, leaking faucet) has ever gone unresolved for days because the request lived in a notebook nobody checked.

jobs.name: Podcast Guest Release Form Outstanding Check
jobs.description: Flags recorded guest episodes where the signed appearance release form hasn't come back yet. Use this if you've ever published (or almost published) a guest episode without written permission on file.

jobs.name: Guest Review Response Check
jobs.description: Checks for recent guest reviews across your listing platforms that haven't gotten a response yet. Use this if a review has ever sat unanswered for weeks, which future guests read as nobody's paying attention.

jobs.name: Guest Satisfaction Score Monitor
jobs.description: Tracks your rolling average guest satisfaction score (post-stay survey or aggregated review rating) and flags a meaningful drop against your trailing baseline. Use this if satisfaction has ever slid gradually over several weeks without triggering any single alarm, until it shows up as a rate hit in the OTA ranking algorithm.

jobs.name: Gutter Cleaning Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to clean out your gutters based on how long it's been since the last cleaning. Use this if you've ever noticed water overflowing or plants sprouting in your gutters because it had been way longer than you thought.

jobs.name: Gym Equipment Maintenance Check
jobs.description: Tracks usage hours or calendar time against manufacturer service intervals for cardio and strength equipment, and flags what's coming due. Use this if a treadmill has ever broken down mid-workout because its service interval quietly passed unnoticed.

jobs.name: Gym Membership Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a member's contract term ends so there's time to reach out before they quietly let it lapse. Use this if a membership has ever ended and the member just never came back, without anyone reaching out during the window when a renewal conversation could've happened.

jobs.name: Daily Habit Check-in
jobs.description: Reminds you to log a habit each day and reports your current streak. Use this if you're trying to build a habit and want a daily nudge plus a running streak count without a separate app.

jobs.name: Employee Handbook Acknowledgment Tracking
jobs.description: Checks the full roster against the current handbook version and flags anyone who hasn't signed off on it yet — including existing employees after a handbook update, not just new hires. Use this if a handbook revision has ever gone out and only a fraction of the company actually acknowledged it, which nobody discovered until it mattered in a dispute.

jobs.name: Harvest Timing Window Check
jobs.description: Checks a crop's expected maturity date against the near-term weather forecast and flags the best upcoming window to harvest before rain, wind, or an early freeze causes losses. Use this if you've ever left a crop in the field a few days too long and watched a storm knock it down.

jobs.name: Headcount vs. Budget Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares your team's approved headcount budget against actual filled and open reqs, and flags when they drift apart. Use this if you've ever found out in a planning meeting that you were over (or under) headcount because nobody had reconciled reqs against budget in months.

jobs.name: Headcount vs. Budget Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares actual headcount per department against the planned/budgeted headcount and flags departments that are over or under plan. Use this if a department has ever quietly overhired (or sat understaffed) for a quarter before finance and HR compared notes and noticed.

jobs.name: Health Inspection Due Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a health department inspection is expected, based on your jurisdiction's typical interval. Use this if an inspector has ever shown up to a kitchen that wasn't ready because nobody was tracking when the last one happened.

jobs.name: Health Inspection Prep Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds the team of the standard health-inspection checklist on a recurring basis, not just when an inspection is imminent. Use this if you've ever scrambled the morning an inspector showed up unannounced.

jobs.name: Heavy Equipment Inspection Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks owned heavy equipment (excavators, cranes, lifts, and similar) against their required annual/periodic safety inspection dates and flags anything overdue or coming due. Use this if a piece of owned equipment has ever kept running past its inspection date because nobody was tracking it the way rentals get tracked.

jobs.name: Help Center Broken Link Check
jobs.description: Crawls links inside your published help center articles and flags any that return a broken or error status. Use this if a customer has ever hit a dead "click here for setup instructions" link in an article that hadn't been opened, let alone tested, in months.

jobs.name: HIPAA Chart Access Log Audit
jobs.description: Scans the EHR's chart-access log for high-volume, off-hours, or otherwise unusual access patterns and has an agent judge which are worth a closer look. Use this if unauthorized or curious chart access (a coworker's family member, a local celebrity, an ex-spouse) has ever gone unnoticed because nobody was reviewing the access log until an audit or complaint forced it.

jobs.name: HOA Fee Collection Check
jobs.description: Scans an HOA/association dues ledger for owners who are past due and totals what's outstanding. Use this if unpaid association dues have ever piled up silently until the reserve fund came up short.

jobs.name: Holiday Boarding Overbooking Risk Check
jobs.description: Looks at upcoming holiday-period boarding reservations against capacity and staffing levels, and gives a plain-language risk assessment of whether you're headed toward overbooking. Use this if a busy holiday weekend has ever left you scrambling to find extra kennel space or overnight staff after the reservations were already confirmed.

jobs.name: Holiday Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Looks ahead at upcoming holidays or company-wide days off and checks whether support staffing is thin relative to expected ticket volume. Use this if a holiday has ever snuck up with half the team out and nobody noticed the schedule gap until tickets were already piling up.

jobs.name: Home Insurance Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before your homeowners or renters insurance policy renews or expires, so you have time to shop around or confirm coverage. Use this if you've ever auto-renewed at a worse rate because the renewal notice got buried in your inbox.

jobs.name: Hotel Cancellation Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a hotel booking's free-cancellation window closes. Use this if you've ever gotten charged for a hotel you meant to cancel because the deadline passed while you were still deciding.

jobs.name: Housekeeping Turnover Time Check
jobs.description: Checks logged checkout and room-ready timestamps and flags any room whose turnover took longer than your target window, or is still missing a ready time. Use this if a room has ever still been mid-clean when the next guest arrived because nobody was tracking turnover times.

jobs.name: Hreflang Audit
jobs.description: Checks a page's hreflang tags for missing reciprocal links or obviously wrong language/region codes. Use this if a hreflang mistake has ever quietly sent the wrong country's visitors to the wrong language version.

jobs.name: HVAC Filter Change Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to change your HVAC filter based on how long it's been. Use this if you've ever found a filter so clogged you forgot it was ever white.

jobs.name: I-9 Reverification Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks employees whose work authorization document has an expiration date and warns before I-9 reverification is due. Use this if an I-9 reverification deadline has ever been missed and only caught during an audit.

jobs.name: IAM Key Rotation Reminder
jobs.description: Checks how old your IAM access keys are and flags any past your rotation age. Use this if you've ever found a years-old access key still active because nobody was tracking key age.

jobs.name: Idle Cash Sweep Check
jobs.description: Flags brokerage cash that's sat uninvested longer than your target window, so it doesn't quietly miss out on being invested or swept into a money market/high-yield option. Use this if cash from a sold position or a deposit has ever sat earning nothing for months because moving it was never anyone's job.

jobs.name: IEP/504 Review Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks upcoming IEP and 504 plan review deadlines and flags any that are close or already past due. Use this if a required review has ever slipped past its compliance deadline because it wasn't on anyone's calendar until a parent or auditor asked about it.

jobs.name: Image Alt Text Audit
jobs.description: Checks a page for images missing alt text. Use this if images have ever shipped without alt text because nobody double-checked before merging.

jobs.name: Pharmacy Immunization Inventory Check
jobs.description: Checks the pharmacy counter's vaccine stock (flu, COVID, and other pharmacist-administered immunizations) against a minimum on-hand level and expiry dates. Use this if you've ever had to turn a walk-in vaccination patient away because the freezer was low or the remaining doses were about to expire.

jobs.name: Immunization Record Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks enrolled children's immunization records against your state's required schedule and flags anyone missing required documentation. Use this if a compliance gap has ever gone unnoticed until a state licensing inspection found it first.

jobs.name: In-Kind Donation Acknowledgment Check
jobs.description: Flags in-kind (non-cash) gifts — equipment, supplies, professional services — that haven't received their fair-market-value acknowledgment letter. Use this if an in-kind donor has ever been missed because your cash-donation thank-you workflow doesn't cover gifts that aren't a dollar amount.

jobs.name: Inbox Triage
jobs.description: Sorts your unread messages into "needs a reply today" vs. "just FYI" vs. "spam," and drafts quick replies for the easy ones — it never sends anything without you approving it first. Use this if your inbox piles up and you want a head start each morning.

jobs.name: Incident Report Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews open incident reports (a scuffle in daycare, a minor scratch, a gate left open) and drafts a status summary of which ones still need a follow-up action — an owner call, a policy note, a facility fix — before they're closed out. Use this if incident reports have ever piled up without anyone confirming the follow-up actually happened. This is business/administrative tracking, not a medical assessment of any injury.

jobs.name: Incident Report Follow-Up Tracking
jobs.description: Reviews recent incident/injury reports and flags any that are missing a parent notification, a corrective action note, or a required licensing notification. Use this if an incident report has ever sat "filed" with nobody confirming the parent was actually told or that a hazard got fixed, not just written up.

jobs.name: Injury/Incident Report Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks logged injury or incident reports for ones still open past a follow-up window, whether that's a member wellness check-in, an insurance filing, or a facility fix. Use this if an incident has ever been logged the day it happened and then never actually closed out or followed up on.

jobs.name: Inspection Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a scheduled inspection date, so the site is actually ready. Use this if an inspector has ever shown up to a site that wasn't prepped because the date snuck up on the crew.

jobs.name: Insurance Eligibility Verification Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming appointments for patients whose insurance eligibility hasn't been verified yet, so it gets confirmed before the visit instead of at checkout. Use this if a patient has ever been surprised with a denied claim because eligibility was never checked ahead of time.

jobs.name: Property Insurance Policy Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Flags property insurance policies that are coming up for renewal within a set window. Use this if a policy has ever lapsed because the renewal notice got buried in an inbox and nobody caught it in time.

jobs.name: International Driving Permit Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before your International Driving Permit (IDP) expires or before an upcoming trip where you'll need one but haven't gotten it yet. Use this if you've ever shown up at a rental counter abroad without the permit and gotten turned away.

jobs.name: International Shipment Documentation Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming international shipments for missing export/import paperwork before they're due to ship. Use this if a shipment has ever reached the port only to get held up because the commercial invoice or certificate of origin was never finalized.

jobs.name: Interview Feedback Overdue Check
jobs.description: Flags interviews that happened but still have no feedback submitted, so the decision doesn't stall waiting on one interviewer. Use this if a candidate has ever been left hanging because feedback from one interviewer never showed up and nobody chased it down.

jobs.name: Interview Feedback Score Divergence Check
jobs.description: Flags candidates whose interview panel submitted wildly different scores, so someone schedules a debrief instead of the decision quietly defaulting to whoever spoke loudest. Use this if a hiring decision has ever moved forward despite one interviewer strongly disagreeing and no one actually discussing it.

jobs.name: Interview Loop Feedback Nag
jobs.description: Checks which interviewers on a hiring loop haven't submitted their scorecard within a set window after the interview. Use this if a hiring decision has ever stalled because one interviewer's feedback never showed up and nobody chased it down.

jobs.name: Interviewer Certification Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks who's been scheduled to conduct interviews against your list of trained/certified interviewers and flags anyone booked who hasn't completed interviewer training. Use this if someone has ever ended up on an interview panel without having done the structured interviewing or bias-awareness training your process requires.

jobs.name: Interviewer Load Balance Check
jobs.description: Counts how many interviews each interviewer is booked for this week and flags anyone stacked well above the team average. Use this if the same few people always seem to be doing most of the interviewing while others rarely get asked.

jobs.name: Inventory Count Discrepancy Check
jobs.description: Compares a physical inventory count against system records and flags mismatches worth investigating. Use this if shrinkage or data entry errors have ever gone unnoticed until a full audit months later.

jobs.name: Inventory Shrinkage Watch
jobs.description: Tracks the gap between expected and actual inventory over time and flags when shrinkage (theft, damage, data-entry error) crosses a threshold. Use this if shrinkage has ever only gotten noticed at the annual physical count instead of trending visibly for months first.

jobs.name: Inventory Valuation Method Audit Reminder
jobs.description: Ahead of each period close, reminds someone to review inventory valuation assumptions (FIFO, LIFO, or weighted-average costing) for anomalies like a unit cost that jumped sharply or a SKU that quietly switched costing method. Use this if a valuation error has ever only surfaced when the accountant closed the books, instead of getting caught while it could still be fixed.

jobs.name: Inventory Waste Log Review
jobs.description: Reviews the kitchen's waste log for the week and flags which items are being tossed most, in case it's an over-ordering or portioning problem. Use this if food cost keeps creeping up and nobody's sure why.

jobs.name: Invoice Overdue Check
jobs.description: Flags invoices that are past due and still unpaid. Use this if you freelance or run a small business and invoices have ever slipped through the cracks.

jobs.name: IP Address Block Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks how full each of your allocated IP address blocks is and warns when a block is running low on free addresses. Use this if you've ever had to scramble for a new allocation, or delay a provisioning order, because a subnet quietly filled up and nobody was watching utilization.

jobs.name: Commercial Irrigation System Inspection Scheduling Check
jobs.description: Checks your commercial client list for irrigation systems whose last inspection date has passed the required inspection interval, and flags them so a visit can be scheduled. Use this if a commercial property's sprinkler system has ever run for weeks with a broken head or stuck valve because inspections weren't on anyone's calendar.

jobs.name: Irrigation Need Check
jobs.description: Checks recent rainfall and forecast against a soil-moisture threshold to tell you whether irrigation is actually needed today. Use this if you've ever watered on a fixed schedule and either wasted water after rain or under-watered during a dry stretch.

jobs.name: ISBN Registration Tracker
jobs.description: Flags upcoming titles that don't yet have an ISBN assigned and registered with the relevant agency, checked against their planned publication date. Use this if a title has ever hit its pub date without an ISBN because registration wasn't started early enough.

jobs.name: Job Backlog Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks jobs still sitting unscheduled and flags any that have been waiting longer than your target turnaround. Use this if a customer request has ever gotten stuck in an unscheduled queue for days because it fell below newer, easier-to-book jobs and nobody was watching the backlog's age, only its size.

jobs.name: Job Completion Photo Documentation Check
jobs.description: Checks recently completed jobs for missing before/after photos, the documentation most warranty claims, insurance disputes, and "the tech never showed" complaints hinge on. Use this if a warranty claim or a customer dispute has ever gone badly because nobody could prove what the job site looked like before or after the work.

jobs.name: Job Cost Overrun Alert
jobs.description: Compares each completed job's actual cost against what was quoted or estimated and flags any that ran over by more than your tolerance. Use this if a job has ever quietly bled margin — extra parts, extra labor hours, a misjudged estimate — and nobody noticed until the month's numbers came in low.

jobs.name: Job Posting Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks open job postings against their planned expiry or repost date and flags any that have gone stale on a job board. Use this if a posting has ever sat expired for weeks before anyone noticed applications had quietly stopped coming in.

jobs.name: Jobsite Safety Incident & Near-Miss Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews recently logged safety incidents and near-misses across active sites for repeat causes, escalating severity, or a site racking up more reports than its peers. Use this if a serious incident has ever happened after a string of smaller near-misses that, in hindsight, pointed right at it.

jobs.name: Kubernetes Pod Restart Watch
jobs.description: Checks for pods with a high restart count and flags them. Use this if a crash-looping pod has ever burned through hours before anyone noticed it wasn't actually staying up.

jobs.name: Kitchen Ticket Time Watch
jobs.description: Reviews kitchen display system ticket times (fire to plate-up) and flags stations or dayparts running consistently slower than target. Use this if slow ticket times have ever driven complaints or comps before anyone traced it back to a specific station falling behind.

jobs.name: Knowledge Base Article Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags published help center articles that haven't been reviewed or updated in a long time. Use this if a stale article has ever kept giving customers outdated instructions because nobody was tracking when it was last touched.

jobs.name: Lab Result Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Checks for lab results that came back a while ago but haven't been reviewed by a provider or communicated to the patient yet. Use this if a result has ever sat in a queue for days because nobody was tracking turnaround from result-received to patient-notified.

jobs.name: Lab Result Turnaround Check
jobs.description: Checks which submitted lab orders still have no result logged past their expected turnaround time. Use this if a sample has ever sat at an outside lab for a week with nobody following up because no one was tracking orders against their expected turnaround.

jobs.name: Labor Cost Percentage Watch
jobs.description: Checks labor cost as a percentage of sales against your target and flags it when it runs high. Use this if overstaffing on a slow shift has ever quietly eaten a week's margin before anyone pulled the labor numbers and noticed.

jobs.name: Warehouse Labor Productivity Rate Check
jobs.description: Compares units processed per labor hour against a target rate, by shift or work area. Use this if a shift's productivity has ever quietly drifted below what staffing was planned around, without anyone noticing until the labor budget was already blown for the month.

jobs.name: Farmland Lease Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Checks each farmland lease's end date and required notice period, and warns when it's time to start renewal or renegotiation conversations. Use this if you've ever lost a rented parcel to another farmer simply because you didn't reach out to the landowner before the notice deadline passed.

jobs.name: Landing Page Conversion Drop Check
jobs.description: Reviews a landing page's conversion rate over a recent window against its baseline and flags a real drop. Use this if a landing page has ever quietly stopped converting — a broken form, a slow load, a redesign that hurt clarity — while traffic and ad spend kept flowing in as if nothing changed.

jobs.name: Landlord Insurance Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Tracks open property insurance claims and flags any that haven't had a status update within a set number of days. Use this if a claim has ever gone quiet for weeks with the adjuster because nobody was following up on where it stood.

jobs.name: Language Learning App Streak Check
jobs.description: Checks a log file where you record your language-app streak count and warns if it's dropped or gone stale. Use this if you've ever opened Duolingo (or similar) two weeks late to find your streak quietly died.

jobs.name: Lapsed Donor Check
jobs.description: Flags donors who gave before but haven't in a while, before they're fully lost. Use this if lapsed-donor outreach only happens during the annual campaign instead of catching people while it's still recoverable.

jobs.name: Last-Mile Delivery Exception Check
jobs.description: Checks recent deliveries for exceptions — failed attempts, refused packages, address issues — and flags them for follow-up. Use this if a failed delivery has ever sat unresolved until an annoyed customer emailed asking where their order was.

jobs.name: Late Fee & Interest Accrual Risk Check
jobs.description: Estimates the dollar cost of leaving an overdue bill unpaid by projecting late fees and accrued interest against its grace period. Use this if you want to know what an overdue balance is actually costing you, not just that it's overdue (see accounts-payable-aging-check for the plain aging list).

jobs.name: Layaway & Special Order Pickup Tracker
jobs.description: Flags layaway and special-order items that have been ready for pickup past a set number of days. Use this if a paid-for special order has ever sat in the back room for weeks because nobody was tracking pickup age, only whether the item had arrived.

jobs.name: Lead Response Time Check
